General.Name: Mansion International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Mansion International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells baby and children garments in Hong Kong and Macau. The company also engages in the trading of children wear. It offers its products under the Mides brand and complementary third party brand products through self-operated retail stores and department store counters. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Empire Court, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
